title: Marine Parks and Reserves (Adoption of General Management Plans) Regulations, 2006
title_en: Marine Parks and Reserves (Adoption of General Management Plans) Regulations, 2006

provisions.title: 1 Citation and commencement
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Marine Parks and Reserves (Adoption of General Management Plans) Regulations, 2006 and shall come into operation on the date of publication.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations:— “ Act ” means the Marine Parks and Reserves Act ; “ Planning Commission ” means the National Planning Commission established by the Planning Commission Act ; and “ Warden ” means the Warden appointed under section 6 of the Act .

provisions.title: Minister to direct committee and village councils
provisions.content: (1) After the declaration of a marine park or a marine reserve in the Minister Gazette ,the Minister shall as soon as possible, direct the Advisory Committee, the local government authority concerned, other stakeholders and the village council of the relevant villages situated within or in the vicinity of the marine park to make proposals for a General Management Plan in respect of the marine park or marine reserve. (2) The Board shall pass the Minister’s directive to the Advisory Com­mittee and village councils with broad guidelines of the matters which shall be covered in their respective proposals of a General Management Plan for the marine park or reserve.

provisions.title: Advisory Commitee
provisions.content: Upon receipt of the Minister’s directive under regulation 3 , the Advisory Committee shall convene a meeting of its members for the purpose of making the necessary inquiries and preparations for the com­pilation of the General Management Plan. (2) The Advisory Committee shall consult with the Warden and the relevant local government planning body in the compilation of its recommendations for a General Management Plan. [Please note: numbering as in original.]

provisions.title: Board to compile final draft to GMP
provisions.content: (1) The Board shall, upon receipt of proposal for a General Management Plan from the village councils and the Advisory Committee, consult with the Planning Commission and compile the draft General Management Plan for submission to the Minister. (2) The Board may request additional information or data from the Advisory Committee, the Warden or any village council on any relevant matters bearing on the proposed General Management Plan.

provisions.title: Adoption of GMP and gazettement
provisions.content: (1) Upon receipt of the draft General Mnagement Plan from the and Board, the Minister shall consider and adopt the plan with or without modifications as he thinks fit. (2) The Minister may order the Board to provide further information or data on the draft General Management Plan.

provisions.title: Mafia Island GMP
provisions.content: Notwithstanding anything contained in these Regulations, the Island General Management Plan for the Mafia Island Marine Park shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 30th day of September 2000.

provisions.title: Amendment of GMPs
provisions.content: (1) The Minister may adopt any modifications to a General GMPs Management Plan, which shall, by notice be published in the Gazette . (2) Save for minor modifications, the adoption or modification to a General Management Plan shall be made mutatis mutandis on proce­dures applicable in these Regulations.
